name: Kona Inn Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two 8x4x3-inch loaf pans.
3. Stir together the flour, salt, and baking soda in a bowl.
4. In another larger bowl, mix together the shortening, sugar, mashed bananas, eggs, and walnuts.
5. Add the combined dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until thoroughly blended.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
7. Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until a skewer or straw inserted in the center of the loaves comes out clean with only a few moist crumbs.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pans for 5 minutes. Then turn out onto a rack and let cool completely.
Yield: two 8x4x3 inch loaf pans
